channel.title: method size on Mohit Kanwar's App
channel.description: Recent content in method size on Mohit Kanwar's App

item.title: Kareena Kapoor Controllers and the Fluffy Services
item.description: A microservice is a small, independent application that is designed to perform a specific business functionality. It is a software architectural style that structures an application as a collection of loosely coupled services, each running in its own process and communicating with each other through lightweight mechanisms, such as HTTP or messaging protocols. Today, we are going to learn how to structure an individual microservice application, and break it down into different components.
